## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `node ./scripts/validate-pack.mjs`
- [ ] `npm --prefix web run lint`
- [ ] `npm --prefix web run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the issue or explained why none was needed.
- [ ] I updated docs for any public-facing change.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` when the public surface changed.
